summary: The build failed while trying to download a prebuilt nydus artifact with wget; the download returned a 502 error which caused the Docker build step to exit and the buildx bake to fail.
root_cause: A network/remote server error occurred when running wget to fetch the nydus release from GitHub; wget returned "HTTP/1.1 502 Bad Gateway or Proxy Error" and the RUN step exited with code 1, causing the build to fail.

evidence.quote: #72 0.149 wget: server returned error: HTTP/1.1 502 Bad Gateway or Proxy Error
evidence.reason: Shows wget received a 502 Bad Gateway/Proxy error when trying to download the artifact.

evidence.quote: #72 ERROR: process "/bin/bash -c wget https://github.com/dragonflyoss/nydus/releases/download/$NYDUS_VERSION/nydus-static-$NYDUS_VERSION-$TARGETOS-$TARGETARCH.tgz" did not complete successfully: exit code: 1
evidence.reason: Indicates the RUN command that executed wget failed and exited with code 1, aborting the build step.

evidence.quote:
Dockerfile:336
--------------------
  334 |     ARG TARGETARCH
  335 |     SHELL ["/bin/bash", "-c"]
  336 | >>> RUN wget https://github.com/dragonflyoss/nydus/releases/download/$NYDUS_VERSION/nydus-static-$NYDUS_VERSION-$TARGETOS-$TARGETARCH.tgz
evidence.reason: Identifies the exact Dockerfile line that runs wget to fetch the nydus artifact.

evidence.quote: ##[error]buildx bake failed with: ERROR: failed to solve: process "/bin/bash -c wget https://github.com/dragonflyoss/nydus/releases/download/$NYDUS_VERSION/nydus-static-$NYDUS_VERSION-$TARGETOS-$TARGETARCH.tgz" did not complete successfully: exit code: 1
evidence.reason: Top-level CI error message showing buildx bake failed because the wget step did not complete successfully.

suggested_fix: Retry the job (transient network error). If failures persist, make the Dockerfile download step more robust (e.g., add retry logic or use curl/wget with --tries/--retry) or host the nydus artifact on a reliable mirror or vend the artifact into the build context so the build does not depend on the external GitHub release at build time.
